package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for missing_rate_limiting_on_auth_endpoint: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Login, registration, or password-reset endpoints without rate-limiting middleware.
type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointModel struct {
    ID        string       `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID  string       `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status    string       `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointRepository struct {
    db    *gorm.DB
    sql   *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointModel
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointService struct {
    repo   *CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointRepository
    client *http.Client
}

type CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpoint(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpointDTO) error {
    // Auth endpoints registered without any rate-limiting middleware.
    router := gin.Default()
    router.POST("/login", func(c *gin.Context) {
        username := c.PostForm("username")
        password := c.PostForm("password")
        _ = username
        _ = password
        c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"token": "jwt-token"})
    })
    router.POST("/register", func(c *gin.Context) {
        c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"user": "created"})
    })
    router.POST("/password-reset", func(c *gin.Context) {
        c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "email sent"})
    })
    return nil
}
